name: super-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap is the public entry — gates greenfield (lean ideation Q&A → overview/techstack/backlog seed), then dispatches to /harness-bootstrap which scaffolds CLAUDE.md, skeleton docs, path-scoped rules, and curated skill/MCP/hook picks. Bundles /sb-commit (session-isolated, doc-sync-gated) and /sb-todo (active-work scanner). Solo dev workflow.
